name: Shopify
one_liner: Leading hosted ecommerce platform for online stores.
auth_note: Apps use OAuth2 access tokens; custom apps in a store use Admin API access tokens.
access_note: Create a public/custom app yourself in Partner dashboard or store admin; free dev stores available.
mcp_note: Official Storefront MCP and Customer Accounts MCP servers on shopify.dev, plus a Dev MCP.
main_blocker: None; self-serve app creation with free dev store.

name: WooCommerce
one_liner: Open-source WordPress plugin turning sites into stores.
auth_note: REST API uses consumer key/secret over HTTPS (Basic auth); OAuth1.0a for non-HTTPS. Keys self-generated in WP admin.
access_note: Generate keys in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API; free but requires your own WordPress+WooCommerce install.
mcp_note: Community WooCommerce MCP servers exist; no official one confirmed.
main_blocker: Need a self-hosted WordPress/WooCommerce store to test against.

name: BigCommerce
one_liner: SaaS ecommerce platform with open, API-first architecture.
auth_note: Store-level API accounts issue OAuth tokens (X-Auth-Token); created in store control panel.
access_note: Free trial store lets you create API account credentials yourself; no approval needed.
mcp_note: No official MCP confirmed this research.
main_blocker: None significant; trial store + self-serve token.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_liner: Enterprise B2C/B2B commerce platform, contract-only access.
auth_note: OAuth2 via SLAS/Account Manager; every call needs a client ID and realm ID from your AE.
access_note: Requires an enterprise contract; on-demand sandboxes need purchased sandbox credits via Account Executive. No free trial.
main_blocker: No self-serve instance; requires paid enterprise realm/sandbox credits.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_liner: Open-source and enterprise commerce platform, self-hostable.
auth_note: OAuth1.0a for integrations, token-based (admin/integration tokens), JWT for GraphQL customer/admin; SOAP also supported.
access_note: Magento Open Source is free and self-hostable; create integration + token in admin. Adobe Commerce edition is paid/enterprise.
main_blocker: Requires standing up and hosting a Magento instance (heavy setup).

name: Squarespace
one_liner: Website builder with commerce APIs for merchants.
auth_note: API keys for custom apps require Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth is only via Squarespace Extensions (approval form required).
access_note: Commerce API key access requires a paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth Extensions are gated behind an approval form.
main_blocker: Requires paid Commerce Advanced plan; OAuth path needs approval.

name: Ecwid
one_liner: Embeddable store widget by Lightspeed with REST API.
auth_note: OAuth2 for public apps; custom/own-store apps can skip OAuth and use a non-expiring store access token.
access_note: Free plan available; register custom app to get access tokens for your own store without approval.
main_blocker: Public app listing needs review, but own-store token access is self-serve.

name: Gumroad
one_liner: Platform for creators selling digital products directly.
auth_note: OAuth2 with application access token; generate app and token in account settings (Advanced).
access_note: Create an application and get an access token yourself from your Gumroad account.
mcp_note: Composio offers a hosted Gumroad MCP (7 tools); no official Gumroad MCP.
main_blocker: Narrow API surface (products, sales, subscribers, licenses).

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_liner: Amazon's API for sellers and vendors to automate operations.
auth_note: Login with Amazon (LWA) OAuth2 credentials; public apps use OAuth flows, private apps self-authorized.
access_note: Must register as developer, hold a professional selling account, submit a reviewed developer profile; restricted (PII) roles need extra architecture review.
mcp_note: No official Amazon SP-API MCP found.
main_blocker: Amazon developer-registration approval plus professional seller account required; cannot self-obtain quickly.

name: fanbasis
one_liner: Merchant-of-record payments/checkout platform for creators and coaches.
auth_note: REST API keys passed via x-api-key header, generated from the FanBasis dashboard (per public API reference).
access_note: Public REST reference (apidocs.fan) and npm checkout SDK exist; keys self-generated, but full dev docs (dev-docs.fanbasis.com) are login-gated and it requires a FanBasis merchant account.
main_blocker: Obscure vendor; primary docs login-gated and require a FanBasis merchant account to obtain keys.
